channel.title: The Grant Desk - Research & Journalism, Worldwide, added in last 30 days
channel.description: Paid open calls, fellowships and residencies in AI, tech, research, and digital and mixed-media arts, sorted into the right pile. Updated as new calls land on the desk. Filtered to: Research & Journalism, Worldwide, added in last 30 days.

item.title: Omidyar Network: Tech Journalism Fund
item.description:
Organisation: Omidyar Network

Location: Open to journalists and media organizations worldwide.

Award: $5,000-$25,000 per project. Rolling deadline through December 31, 2026. No application fee.

Duration: Per-project; scope and timeline defined in the proposal.

Deadline: 31 Dec 2026

The Omidyar Network Tech Journalism Fund offers rolling grants of $5,000-$25,000 for technology journalism projects. Relevant for journalists and media organizations investigating AI, tech policy, and AI's impacts on culture, society, and creative industries. Applications are accepted on a rolling basis through December 31, 2026 — one of the few currently open opportunities with a confirmed near-term deadline. Apply via the application form on omidyar.com.

Open call details

Want to see more grants? Visit The Grant Desk (https://www.artificialnouveau.com/smalltools/grants/).
